{{CargoOrgan
|name=Strength Crystal
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10861
|idx=68
|description="The Strength is channeled from Acupoint Baihui, runs through the body, converges into Dantian, warms up for 7 years and finally forms crystals!"
—The Strength Yijin Jing
|skill=
|hp=2288
|def=164
|atk=139
|rush=313
|gene1=In Angel or Mecha Forms, {race} ATK +120
|gene2=When in Angel or Mecha Forms:
> Gain +6% Cells in explorations
|gene3=Water DMG +90
|gene4=Each round, {race} DEF +60
|gene5=Species War Cabin, deployable robots +3
|gene7=Species War Cabin, deployable robots +9 (Awakened)
|}}
